Pay Rate // your ladder tap for how it works ▾
◆ EXPERIENCE HOURS
ON THE BOOK
0 hrs
Log your hours or upload a stub — the Order tracks every step to your next pay bump.
Base0 Tier 11,000 Tier 22,000 Tier 34,001
CLIMB TO NEXT BUMP
⬆ CLIMBING

How the ladder pays. Every hour you're paid stacks as Experience Hours — they're printed on every stub, and they set your base rate for life:

0 – 1,000 hrs$42.40
1,001 – 2,000 hrs · Tier 1 passed$43.40
2,001 – 4,000 hrs · Tier 2 passed$45.40
4,001+ hrs · Tier 3 — full basic$58.85

On top of base: nights pay ×1.333, hoot owl ×1.6 (5-hr shift), and every Saturday, Sunday, and holiday hour is overtime at ×1.5. Skill jobs (UTR, Skill II) carry their own differentials. Rates shown are the 7/4/26 contract raise.

THE WIRE

PREDICTED STOP
—
reading the wire…
The Drop Log // jobs coming down every drop pays ⬡

You're standing at your dispatch — this is for the board in front of you. They don't drop it all at once: 150 UTR now, 40 swing twenty minutes later. Log each call as you hear it. Number but no job type? Pick "they didn't say." Only a ballpark? Log it as the estimate. If they run it silent, log nothing — the flop math falls back to a floor.

"No flop" is the official call — the board's done, go home. Your drops ride in as the come-down; the record seals, the wire confirms & pays.

Last 6 Months —
Recent Boards // the record tap a board for its sheet
DOCKETS
Snap the slip, seal the record — every docket feeds your take.
Job Log // sealed record tap to open · long-press to strike
Device Sync // early access beta crew
⭐ EXCLUSIVE BETA FEATURE

You’re one of the Order’s first hands — device-to-device backup is early access, yours before it rolls out to everyone. Keep your log safe and carry it between your devices. Full automatic sync is on the way, and you’re helping shape it.

Back up saves your whole log as a file. Restore merges a backup from another device into this one — it skips duplicates and never deletes anything.

Early-access preview · becomes automatic once cloud sync ships.

YOUR GATE

⚓ — DOCKS 🚢 — SHIPS ☎ — LINES
⌕
MAYDAY
When it goes wrong on the water or the dock — every number, every alert, one place.

Emergency on the terminal — injury, fire, someone in the water: get on the radio first. No radio? Call the terminal's security line — they control the gates and walk the medics to you. Help can't find you behind the fence without them.

Your terminal ☎ CALL SECURITY

—

Live Alerts // Harbor Area NWS + USGS

Reading the wire…

Live from the National Weather Service & USGS. Police / fire / medical incident wires land with the backend.

Trouble on the Job? // Call Your BA

Fired off a job? Something dangerous the boss won't fix? Getting worked outside the contract? The Business Agent is your fighter — that's what they're there for. Call before you sign anything or walk off.

☀ BA — Days 🌙 BA — Nights

      The stakes // why it's the long game
      21×
      The leader outworks the median hand — 8,739 vs 411 hrs on the book
      116
      Hands to ever clear Tier 3 — the 4,001-hour summit, out of 5,333

      Standings ride the 2025 hours posting — the true board, all 5,333 hands. Every docket you seal moves your lane live; hands who verified after the posting start at the back and climb the same rails. The next posting trues it all up again.

      MARK EARNED
      —
      —
      ⬡ PORT BUCKS

      The Order pays for the work that keeps the tool sharp. Every action below mints Port Bucks on the spot:

      Seal a docket+10
      Feed the live board during dispatch+15
      Send word — number, map, correction, idea+20
      Share the Order with a casual+25
      Earn a new mark+50

      When the Armory opens, gear moves for cash or Port Bucks. Straight talk: early exchange rates will be steep — the Order can't give away cannons before there's powder in the keg. As the Armory earns, the rates loosen and the grinders get paid. Port Bucks never expire.

      ★ JACKPOT ★
      +0 ⬡
      PORT BUCKS WON

      About & Disclaimer

      The Shadow Hook is an independent tool built by and for San Pedro Bay casuals. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the ILWU, Local 13, the PMA, or any dispatch hall.

      Every pay figure, ranking, board, and countdown is an estimate for planning only — not payroll, not an official dispatch, and not legal or financial advice. Always confirm against your own paystub and the hall's official postings.

      Your card, hours, and dockets live on your device; the optional Brotherhood account syncs them across your own phones. Nothing here is a public record. Snitches get stitches.

      THE ORDER OF THE SHADOW HOOK
      READING THE DOCKET

      Hold on — the system is reading the slip.

      STRIKE THIS ENTRY?

      It leaves the log, the Take, and the clock. This can't be undone.

      Straight off your PMA stub — the YTD figures. Nothing here is shared; it stays on your device and only trues-up your own numbers.
